visual: Bow stance with both fists raised — one near the temple and one extended forward — as if drawing and releasing a bow.
motion_description: Starting from a one-legged balance with the left knee raised in front, the left foot steps down and forward into a left bow stance, shifting the body's weight onto the forward bent leg. As the step is taken, both hands form fists and the torso rotates slightly leftward. The left arm extends forward at chest height with a slight bend in the elbow, while the right arm draws back and upward, bringing the fist near the right temple. The deliberate, steady movement concludes with a firm pause in this extended position before returning to a neutral stance.
